julesThoughtProcess: I chose a vivid Neon Cyan (#00FFFF) to strike a high-contrast balance against the deep blacks. It adds a striking energetic aura, bringing out the cyberpunk aesthetics. I placed it at coordinates (800, 1400) because it sits beautifully in the mosaic's lower-middle section, complementing nearby tiles.
storyPanel: A phantom of the sub-nets, they move through encrypted channels like a neon wraith. Their signature color, a blazing cyan, is the last thing corporate security sees before their firewalls shatter into a million glowing shards.
